ORDER RE: MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD PARTY DEFENANT "ALTER EGO/SUCCESSOR" AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR
MINUTES FOR APR-11-2019 9:30 AM

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DEMAKAS PLUMBING & HEATING, INC.'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD PARTY DEFENDANT "ALTER-EGO/SUCCESSOR" AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DALWONG HOTEL GROUP, LLC IS ADDED AS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR AS THE ALTER-EGO OF UNION SQUARE HOTEL COMPANY. THE COURT HAS THE AUTHORITY UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 187 TO AMEND A JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE AN ALTER EGO WHO WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE UNDERLYING SUIT BUT NEVERTHELESS HAD CONTROL OF THE LITIGATION AS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR. (JACK FARENBAUGH & SON V. BELMONT CONSTRUCTION, INC. (1987) 194 CAL.APP.3D 1023, 1028-30.) THE UNCONTESTED EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WITH THE MOTION SUPPORTS AMENDING THE JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE DALWONG AS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Party Defendant "Alter-Ego"
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Paul Green, Esq. 415-664-9119 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEMAKAS PLUMBLING &. HEATING, INC.'s Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Party Defendant "Alter-Ego/Succesor" as Judgment Debtor.

Plaintiff Demakas Plumbing & Heating, Inc.'s motion to amend judgment to add Party Defendant "Alter-Ego/Successor" as judgment debtor is granted. No opposition filed. Dalwong Hotel Group, LLC is added as a judgment debtor as the alter-ego of Union Square Hotel Company.

The Court has the authority under Code of Civil Procedure section 187 to amend a judgment to include an alter ego who was not a party to the underlying suit but nevertheless had control of the litigation as a judgment debtor. (Jack Farenbaugh & Son v. Belmont Construction, Inc. (1987) 194 Cal.App.3d 1023, 1028-30.) The uncontested evidence submitted with the motion supports amending the judgment to include Dalwong as a judgment debtor.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
